context: Evaluates whether the candidate correctly authors a complete Dependencies section for a skill that uses MCP tools and invokes other skills. All four required subsections must be present and each must contain the correct information.

checklist.name: Required MCP Servers subsection
checklist.description: The Dependencies section includes a 'Required MCP Servers' subsection listing each MCP server by name (in backtick format), with a brief description and at least one link (e.g., setup guide or documentation URL).

checklist.name: Required MCP Tools subsection
checklist.description: The Dependencies section includes a 'Required MCP Tools' subsection. Each tool entry names the tool in backtick format, identifies which server it comes from in parentheses, describes its purpose, and lists its key parameters.

checklist.name: Related Skills subsection
checklist.description: The Dependencies section includes a 'Related Skills' subsection listing all sub-skills that this skill invokes, with a note explaining when or why each is called.

checklist.name: Reference Documentation subsection
checklist.description: The Dependencies section includes a 'Reference Documentation' subsection with at least one internal reference (relative markdown link) and optionally official documentation links.

checklist.name: Completeness and accuracy
checklist.description: All MCP servers, tools, and skills referenced in the skill's workflow steps are listed in the corresponding Dependencies subsections. There are no orphaned tool calls or sub-skill invocations that lack a Dependencies entry.
